zh.lifeSummary: 當Irmgard von Rott於大約1064年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 洛森海姆羅特 阿姆 音時，她的父親Kuno I. von Rott Pfalzgraf von Bayern40歲，母親Uta von Dießen26歲。她和Gebhard II. von Sulzbach至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1101年6月14日享年38歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安-素爾茲巴賀卡斯特爾。

zh-hans.Kloster Kastl, Kastl, Landkreis Amberg-S: 德国貝也藍德可萊斯 安-素爾茲巴賀卡斯特爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Irmgard von Rott于大约1064年出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 洛森海姆羅特 阿姆 音时，她的父亲Kuno I. von Rott Pfalzgraf von Bayern40岁，母亲Uta von Dießen26岁。她和Gebhard II. von Sulzbach至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1101年6月14日享年38岁，埋葬在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 安-素爾茲巴賀卡斯特爾。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Rott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Elfriede, Erwin, Heinz, Klaus, Manfred, Otto, Reinhard.

variants.name: Roth
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for a person with red hair, from Middle High German rōt, German rot ‘red’. As a Jewish name it is at least in part artificial: its frequency as a Jewish surname is disproportionate to the number of Jews who, one may reasonably assume, were red-headed during the period of surname adoption. This form of the German surname (especially in this sense and in the sense 2 below) is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), where it is most common, and in some other European countries, e.g. Czechia and Croatia.

German and English (Middlesex): topographic name for someone who lived on land that had been cleared, from Old High German rod, Middle English roth(e) (Old English roth) ‘clearing’. In England, the name may also be a habitational name from any of the places like Rothend in Ashdon (Essex), Roe End in Markyate (Hertfordshire), Roe Green in Hatfield (Hertfordshire), or Roe Green in Sandon (Hertfordshire).
German: from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic personal names with the first element hrōd ‘renown’. Compare Rode 1, Ross 4.

variants.name: Rottmann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Hans, Kurt, Maximilian.
German: elaborated form of Rott , formed with Middle High German man ‘man’.

nameMeanings.name: Irmgard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Irmgard von Rott was born about 1064, in Rott am Inn, Rosenheim, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Kuno I. von Rott Pfalzgraf von Bayern, was 40 and her mother, Uta von Dießen, was 26. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Gebhard II. von Sulzbach. She died on 14 June 1101, at the age of 38, and was buried in Kastl, Amberg-Sulzbach, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Irmgard von Rott est née environ 1064, à Rott am Inn, Landkreis Rosenheim, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Kuno I. von Rott Pfalzgraf von Bayern, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Uta von Dießen, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Gebhard II. von Sulzbach. Elle est décédée le 14 juin 1101, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Kastl, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Irmgard von Rott um 1064 in Rott am Inn, Landkreis Rosenheim, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Kuno I. von Rott Pfalzgraf von Bayern 40 und ihre Mutter Uta von Dießen 26. Sie hatte mit Gebhard II. von Sulzbach mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 14. Juni 1101 im Alter von 38 Jahren und wurde in Kastl, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Irmgard von Rott è nata il circa 1064 nel Rott am Inn, Landkreis Rosenheim, Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Kuno I. von Rott Pfalzgraf von Bayern, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Uta von Dießen, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Gebhard II. von Sulzbach. Morì il 14 giugno 1101, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Kastl, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Germania.

ko.lifeSummary: Irmgard von Rott(이)가 대략 1064년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 로즈하임 로트 아 이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Kuno I. von Rott Pfalzgraf von Bayern(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Uta von Dießen(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Gebhard II. von Sulzbach(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1101년 6월 14일 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 아버그-설즈바치 카스트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Irmgard von Rott nasceu aproximadamente 1064, em Rott am Inn, Landkreis Rosenheim, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Kuno I. von Rott Pfalzgraf von Bayern, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Uta von Dießen, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Gebhard II. von Sulzbach. Ela faleceu em 14 de junho de 1101, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Kastl, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Irmgard von Rott родилась около 1064 г. в местности ротт ам инн, ландкрис росеним, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Kuno I. von Rott Pfalzgraf von Bayern было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Uta von Dießen, 26. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Gebhard II. von Sulzbach. Она умерла 14 июня 1101 г. в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности кастл, ландкрис эмбирг-сулзбач, беиирн, Германия.
